{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-54775", "cvss": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-248", "name": "Uncaught Exception"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-754", "name": "Improper Check for Unusual or Exceptional Conditions"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-755", "name": "Improper Handling of Exceptional Conditions"}], "description": "### Impact
A CoreWCF service is running and listening on a Kafka topic receiving a null-value record will stop processing new records from that topic.

#### Preconditions
The attacker has produce/write permission on a topic that CoreWCF is consuming from. If the broker permits anonymous publishes, no authentication is required. 

### Patches
Fixed in CoreWCF v1.8.1 and v1.9.1

### Workarounds
Only allow authenticated writes to a topic", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00336, "percentile": 0.25601}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m744-jhq9-ppw6", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:49Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m744-jhq9-ppw6", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m744-jhq9-ppw6"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-54775"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:49Z", "references": ["https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security/advisories/GHSA-m744-jhq9-ppw6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m744-jhq9-ppw6"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/CoreWCF/CoreWCF/security-advisories/GHSA-m744-jhq9-ppw6", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/CoreWCF/CoreWCF", "summary": "CoreWCF: Kafka consume pump halts permanently on a Kafka tombstone (null-value record), causing persistent endpoint denial of service.", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-19T20:46:49Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m744-jhq9-ppw6", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.8.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CoreWCF.Kafka"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.8.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "1.9.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "nuget", "name": "CoreWCF.Kafka"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 1.9.0, < 1.9.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: CoreWCF: Kafka consume pump halts permanently on a Kafka tombstone (null-value record), causing persistent endpoint denial of service.
